title: BITSAT 2026 Syllabus Highlights

detail.title: BITSAT 2026 Syllabus Highlights
detail.short_info: Get the BITSAT Syllabus 2026. It includes detailed topics from Physics (30Q), Chemistry (30Q), Mathematics/Biology (40Q), English Proficiency (10Q), and Logical Reasoning (20Q). Download the official PDF and check the latest exam pattern for 390 marks.

content.text: BITSAT Syllabus 2026 has been released by Birla Institute of Technology and Science (BITS) Pilani. It is based on the NCERT syllabus of Class 11 and 12 and covers five major parts: Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics (or Biology for B.Pharm), English Proficiency, and Logical Reasoning. Birla Institute of Technology and Science (BITS) Pilani conducts the Birla Institute of Technology and Science Admission Test (BITSAT) for admission to integrated first-degree programmes (B.E., B.Pharm, and M.Sc.) at its campuses in Pilani, Goa, and Hyderabad. The exam is a computer-based test with 130 multiple-choice questions.

rows: Birla Institute of Technology and Science (BITS) Pilani
Admission to Integrated First Degree Programmes (BE, B.Pharm, MSc) at BITS Pilani campuses

content.text: Official Syllabus PDF: Download BITSAT Syllabus 2026 PDF (Official)
Marking Scheme: +3 marks for each correct answer, -1 mark for each incorrect answer. No marks for unattempted questions. Duration: 3 hours.

items: Principles of Organic Chemistry and Hydrocarbons

sections.heading: BITSAT Syllabus 2026 for English Proficiency and Logical Reasoning

content.text: English Proficiency: Grammar, Vocabulary, Reading Comprehension, Composition.
Logical Reasoning: Verbal Reasoning (Analogy, Classification, Series, Logical Deduction), Nonverbal Reasoning (Pattern Perception, Figure Formation, Paper Cutting, etc.).

items: Cell: The Unit of Life; Structure and Function
Reproduction, Growth and Movement in Plants
Thoroughly understand the NCERT Class 11 & 12 concepts first.
Focus more on high-weightage topics from previous years.
Practice mock tests regularly to improve speed and accuracy.
Solve previous year BITSAT question papers.
